content.query:
CREATE VIEW     v_SCG_GE_Cost
AS

-- drop view v_SCG_GE_Cost
SELECT *
FROM
(
SELECT			X.*, Y.CostValue as [Cost ECM]
FROM
(
SELECT			distinct A.Division, A.Company, [Customer ID], [Customer Name], [Customer PO], [Order ID]
,				A.Brand, [Product Category], A.[Part ID], [Part Description], [Supplier ID], MAX([Sales Amt]) as [Sales Amt]
,				MAX([Sales Qty]) as [Sales Qty], MAX(CostValue) as [Cost], MAX(B.Date) as IntercoDate_WBM
FROM
(
SELECT			DISTINCT DF.Division as Division
,				DF.Company as Company
,				AC.Customer as [Customer ID]
,				AC.Name as [Customer Name]
,				ATD.CustomerPoNumber as [Customer PO]
,				ATD.SalesOrder as [Order ID]
,				ATD.InvoiceDate as [Date]
,				DF.Brand
,				DF.Category as [Product Category]
,				ISNULL(GV.VisualPartID, ATD.StockCode) as [Part ID]
,				ISNULL(P.Description, IM.Description) as [Part Description]
,				Supplier as [Supplier ID]
,				NetSalesValue as [Sales Amt]
,				QtyInvoiced as [Sales Qty]
,				CostValue/NULLIF(QtyInvoiced,0) as [Cost G]
FROM			SCG.ArTrnSummary ATS
JOIN			SCG.ArTrnDetail ATD on ATS.Invoice = ATD.Invoice
JOIN			SCG.ArCustomer AC on ATS.Customer = AC.Customer
JOIN			SCG.InvMaster IM on ATD.StockCode = IM.StockCode
JOIN			SCA.Division_Family DF on ATD.ProductClass = DF.ProductClass
LEFT JOIN		SCG.GWT_To_Visual GV on ATD.StockCode = GV.SysproStockCode
LEFT JOIN		ECM.PART P on GV.VisualPartID collate database_default = P.ID
WHERE			ATD.InvoiceDate >= '2019-01-01'
and				DF.Company = 'G'
AND				DF.Brand IN ('CHEFS CHOICE', 'EXCALIBUR', 'WESTBEND', 'VINTURI', 'YONANAS')
AND             NetSalesValue > 0
) A

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT			'G' as Company
,				'Countertop' as Division
,				P.ID collate database_default as [Part ID]
,				MAX(COL.LAST_SHIPPED_DATE) as [Date]
,				MAX(Cost) as CostValue
FROM			ECM.CUSTOMER_ORDER CO
JOIN			ECM.CUST_ORDER_LINE COL on CO.ID = COL.CUST_ORDER_ID
JOIN			ECM.PART P on COL.PART_ID = P.ID
LEFT JOIN		ECM.COST_BY_PART_CONSUMER CPC ON P.ID = CPC.ID
WHERE			P.USER_1 IN ('CHEFS CHOICE', 'EXCALIBUR', 'WESTBEND', 'VINTURI', 'YONANAS')
AND				CO.CUSTOMER_ID IN ('AR5569', 'AT6708', 'AZ1111', 'BL3456', 'CO1703', 'CO4930', 'DA5333', 'DA6180',
										 'DE8888', 'DU2913', 'E527663', 'EN1111', 'FAR682', 'GE2828', 'GI0815', 'GR1111',
										 'GR7336', 'GR7337', 'GR7338', 'GWT-LANDIG', 'HB0445', 'HO2804', 'IFA111', 'JA2345',
										 'JA6001', 'KA0142', 'KI3040', 'KI6616', 'KU0951', 'LA1111', 'LI0909', 'MA6040', 'N200000',
										 'N200001', 'NA4484', 'NEX380', 'OP4886', 'RB6760', 'RE1503', 'RI3390', 'RO6500', 'SH2772',
										 'SI1732', 'TA1100', 'TO3145', 'TOM111', 'TR2660', 'V200000', 'V200001', 'VA7855', 'WB1000',
										 'Y200000', 'Y200001')
GROUP BY		FORMAT(COL.LAST_SHIPPED_DATE, 'yyyy-MM'), P.ID
) B				on A.Company = B.Company and A.Division = B.Division and A.[Part ID] = B.[Part ID]
WHERE			Brand IN ('CHEFS CHOICE', 'EXCALIBUR', 'WESTBEND', 'VINTURI', 'YONANAS')
AND				B.Date <= A.Date
GROUP BY		A.Division, A.Company, [Customer ID], [Customer Name], [Customer PO], [Order ID]
,				A.Brand, [Product Category], A.[Part ID], [Part Description], [Supplier ID]
) X

JOIN

(
SELECT			'G' as Company
,				'Countertop' as Division
,				P.ID collate database_default as [Part ID]
,				MAX(COL.LAST_SHIPPED_DATE) as [Date]
,				MAX(Cost) as CostValue
FROM			ECM.CUSTOMER_ORDER CO
JOIN			ECM.CUST_ORDER_LINE COL on CO.ID = COL.CUST_ORDER_ID
JOIN			ECM.PART P on COL.PART_ID = P.ID
LEFT JOIN		ECM.COST_BY_PART_CONSUMER CPC ON P.ID = CPC.ID
WHERE			P.USER_1 IN ('CHEFS CHOICE', 'EXCALIBUR', 'WESTBEND', 'VINTURI', 'YONANAS')
AND				CO.CUSTOMER_ID IN ('AR5569', 'AT6708', 'AZ1111', 'BL3456', 'CO1703', 'CO4930', 'DA5333', 'DA6180',
										 'DE8888', 'DU2913', 'E527663', 'EN1111', 'FAR682', 'GE2828', 'GI0815', 'GR1111',
										 'GR7336', 'GR7337', 'GR7338', 'GWT-LANDIG', 'HB0445', 'HO2804', 'IFA111', 'JA2345',
										 'JA6001', 'KA0142', 'KI3040', 'KI6616', 'KU0951', 'LA1111', 'LI0909', 'MA6040', 'N200000',
										 'N200001', 'NA4484', 'NEX380', 'OP4886', 'RB6760', 'RE1503', 'RI3390', 'RO6500', 'SH2772',
										 'SI1732', 'TA1100', 'TO3145', 'TOM111', 'TR2660', 'V200000', 'V200001', 'VA7855', 'WB1000',
										 'Y200000', 'Y200001')
GROUP BY		FORMAT(COL.LAST_SHIPPED_DATE, 'yyyy-MM'), P.ID
) Y				on X.Company = Y.Company and X.Division = Y.Division and X.[Part ID] = Y.[Part ID] and X.IntercoDate_WBM = Y.Date
) a
where A.[Part ID] = '0312070'
